untranslatable_reason: This signal requires real-time sentiment tracking from 30+ market participants over a 5-day communication baseline with qualitative assessment of anxiety direction and position-based uncertainty. These require external data feeds (trader sentiment indices, call/message logs, qualitative analysis) and multi-day state tracking that are not available in the allowed indicator set. The core mechanic—detecting when >85% of sources express directional anxiety—cannot be expressed using price/volume/technical indicators alone. A proxy using extreme RSI readings or volatility spikes would fundamentally misrepresent the signal's intent, which is based on behavioral/sentiment exhaustion rather than price exhaustion.
translation_notes: SCHWAGER_DRY_0_0 is a pure sentiment/behavioral signal requiring external data infrastructure (trader communication monitoring, sentiment aggregation, multi-source tracking). To implement this signal, a backtest engine would need: (1) integrated sentiment data feed from exchanges or broker communications, (2) multi-day rolling sentiment state storage, (3) source classification/weighting system, (4) qualitative anxiety-direction detection. A technical-only proxy using india_vix crosses or rsi_14 extremes would lose the predictive edge (exhaustion via consensus, not price extremes).
